title: Bookmarks: Favorite Sites
drDigitalIntro:
Bookmarks are your favorite websites.
• Click the star and choose Add Bookmark, or press Ctrl+D.
• The browser saves the address for one-click return.
• Organize them into folders like News, Shopping, or Weather.

steps.say: Let's save a favorite site. First go to shop.example — type it in the address bar and press Enter.
Now click the ☆ star, then Add Bookmark. It'll be one click away anytime.

drDigitalSuccess: You bookmarked a site. See it appear in the bookmarks bar — now you can return with a single click, no typing.
drDigitalHint: The ☆ star is at the right end of the address bar. Click it, then click Add Bookmark.
